body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-7302", "cvss": {"score": 9.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 9.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-35", "name": "Path Traversal: '.../...//'"}], "description": "SGLang's multimodal generation runtime is vulnerable to an unauthenticated path traversal vulnerability, allowing an attacker to write arbitrary files anywhere the server process has write access, by including ../ sequences in the upload filename when sent to specific endpoints.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00386, "percentile": 0.30543}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-qwrp-wghp-94q2", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-29T17:26:20Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qwrp-wghp-94q2", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-qwrp-wghp-94q2"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-7302"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-18T12:16:16Z", "published_at": "2026-05-18T12:31:47Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-7302", "https://antiproof.ai/blog/three-rces-in-sglang", "https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/tree/main/python/sglang", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qwrp-wghp-94q2"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang", "summary": "SGLang's multimodal generation runtime has an unauthenticated path traversal vulnerability", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-29T17:26:20Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-qwrp-wghp-94q2", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "sglang"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 0.5.5, <= 0.5.12"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
